data.name: Sex Apartment 2: Grand Hotel
data.detailed_description:
Sex Apartment 2: Grand Hotel is a continuation of a visual novel dating simulator. The story now takes place in a seaside hotel where temptation is part of everyday life.

You play as Taro, who now takes on the role of a resort hotel manager. You can expect a variety of encounters with guests, staff, and familiar characters you’ve come to like.

You move between locations, interact with women, help them with everyday tasks, earn money, and gradually get to know them better.

This time, everything is in your hands — use your time wisely and try not to disappoint your father again.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7,8,10,11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4460 / AMD FX-630
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon R7 260
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7,8,10,11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4460 / AMD FX-630

  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon R7 260
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
